scripts.lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check packages web scripts package.json turbo.json
scripts.lint:fix: bunx @biomejs/biome check --write packages web scripts package.json turbo.json
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages web scripts package.json turbo.json
scripts.format:check: bunx @biomejs/biome format packages web scripts package.json turbo.json
scripts.typecheck: bunx turbo run build --filter='./packages/*' && bunx tsc --noEmit --project web/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.test:e2e:all: bun run test:e2e:smoke && bun run test:e2e:auth && bun run test:e2e:integration
